summary: No-ship: the landing page misses the brief's full-language-switch requirement and the PT-PT copy is not fully localized.

findings.title: Language toggle leaves accessibility and metadata copy in English instead of switching through the dictionary
findings.recommendation: Move the page title, meta description, both language-group labels, and the image alt text into the shared dictionary and update them in `applyLang()`. The brief says the PT-PT toggle must switch all copy via one dictionary; today only `[data-i18n]` / `[data-i18n-html]` nodes change, while `title`, `meta[name=description]`, `aria-label="Language"`, and all `alt` strings stay English.

findings.title: PT-PT dictionary still exposes untranslated English labels and terminology
findings.recommendation: Finish the PT-PT localization pass for user-facing labels and common nouns. At minimum, replace untranslated items such as `builders`, `Connectors`, and `Vault`, and review surrounding terminology for PT-PT consistency.
